title: Crafted `ALTER TABLE` statement can cause the connection hang and break the database
description:
## Bug Report

A crafted `ALTER TABLE` statement causes the database connection to hang indefinitely. The query cannot be aborted, and even the KILL statement fails to terminate it. 

If restarting the TiDB instance, it will encounter a schema build error and fail to restart.

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

```sql
CREATE TABLE t (c INT) PARTITION BY RANGE (c) (PARTITION p VALUES LESS THAN (10));
ALTER TABLE t ADD COLUMN c2 INT AS (JSON_EXTRACT(c, '$.number')) VIRTUAL;
```

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)

Should not cause hang or break the database.

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)

```
bash # docker run -d --name some-tidb -p 4000:4000 -p 10080:10080 pingcap/tidb:nightly

bash # mysql -h127.0.0.1 -P4000 -uroot test

Type 'help;' or '\h' for help. Type '\c' to clear the current input statement.

mysql> CREATE TABLE t (c INT) PARTITION BY RANGE (c) (PARTITION p VALUES LESS THAN (10));
Query OK, 0 rows affected (0.01 sec)

mysql> ALTER TABLE t ADD COLUMN c2 INT AS (JSON_EXTRACT(c, '$.number')) VIRTUAL;
^C^C -- query aborted
^C^C -- query aborted
^C^C -- query aborted
```

Attempting to restart the database fails — it's no longer connectable:


```
# docker container restart some-tidb

# mysql -h127.0.0.1 -P4000 -uroot test
ERROR 2013 (HY000): Lost connection to MySQL server at 'reading initial communication packet', system error: 2
```

Docker logs output:
```
[2025/07/16 12:46:20.800 +00:00] [INFO] [tidb.go:93] ["new domain"] [store=30b4a02a-9400-40d1-96bc-19a9beedc02b] ["ddl lease"=45s] ["stats lease"=3s]
[2025/07/16 12:46:20.806 +00:00] [WARN] [controller.go:229] ["[resource group controller] server does not save config, load config failed"]
[2025/07/16 12:46:20.806 +00:00] [INFO] [controller.go:213] ["load resource controller config"] [config="{\"degraded-mode-wait-duration\":\"0s\",\"ltb-max-wait-duration\":\"30s\",\"ltb-token-rpc-max-delay\":\"1s\",\"request-unit\":{\"read-base-cost\":0.125,\"read-per-batch-base-cost\":0.5,\"read-cost-per-byte\":0.0000152587890625,\"write-base-cost\":1,\"write-per-batch-base-cost\":1,\"write-cost-per-byte\":0.0009765625,\"read-cpu-ms-cost\":0.3333333333333333},\"enable-controller-trace-log\":\"false\",\"token-rpc-params\":{\"wait-retry-interval\":\"50ms\",\"wait-retry-times\":20}}"] [ru-config="{\"ReadBaseCost\":0.125,\"ReadPerBatchBaseCost\":0.5,\"ReadBytesCost\":0.0000152587890625,\"WriteBaseCost\":1,\"WritePerBatchBaseCost\":1,\"WriteBytesCost\":0.0009765625,\"CPUMsCost\":0.3333333333333333,\"LTBMaxWaitDuration\":30000000000,\"WaitRetryInterval\":50000000,\"WaitRetryTimes\":20,\"DegradedModeWaitDuration\":0}"] [keyspace-id=4294967295]
[2025/07/16 12:46:20.808 +00:00] [INFO] [mock.go:113] ["owner manager is canceled"] [ownerKey=/tidb/ddl/fg/owner] [ID=716264a2-133f-4b89-beb2-b76e6740b19d]
[2025/07/16 12:46:20.808 +00:00] [INFO] [ddl.go:1050] ["DDL closed"] [category=ddl] [ID=716264a2-133f-4b89-beb2-b76e6740b19d] ["take time"=23.239µs]
[2025/07/16 12:46:20.808 +00:00] [INFO] [ddl.go:768] ["stop DDL"] [category=ddl] [ID=716264a2-133f-4b89-beb2-b76e6740b19d]
[2025/07/16 12:46:20.808 +00:00] [INFO] [domain.go:572] ["domain closed"] ["take time"=58.299µs]
[2025/07/16 12:46:20.808 +00:00] [ERROR] [tidb.go:114] ["init domain failed"] [category=ddl] [error="Build table `test`.`t` schema failed: [expression:3146]Invalid data type for JSON data in argument 1 to function json_extract; a JSON string or JSON type is required."]
```

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

```
Release Version: v9.0.0-beta.2.pre-118-g6ec4810
Edition: Community
Git Commit Hash: 6ec48101cae75529682a0f9fa8c16cbc42f246d3
Git Branch: HEAD
UTC Build Time: 2025-07-16 11:00:02
GoVersion: go1.23.11
Race Enabled: false
Check Table Before Drop: false
Store: unistore
Kernel Type: Classic
```
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, data VARCHAR);
ALTER TABLE t2 ADD COLUMN c2 INT;
UPDATE t2 SET c2 = CAST(JSON_EXTRACT((SELECT data FROM t1 WHERE id = 1), '$.number') AS INT);
SELECT * FROM t2 WHERE c2 IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: ALTER TABLE with JSON_EXTRACT causes connection hang
